REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $947.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT VREIFONE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS AND DOOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANTS TURNER CONSTRUCTION AND SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKER INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
